name.de: Sauerteigbrot mit grünen Oliven und Kräutern
name.es: Pan de masa madre con aceitunas verdes y hierbas
name.fr: Pain au levain aux olives vertes et aux herbes

description.en: Briny Castelvetrano-style green olives and a scattering of herbes de Provence turn a simple wheat sourdough into a Mediterranean-leaning table loaf. Salty, herbal and faintly tangy, it needs nothing more than a good olive oil alongside.
description.de: Salzig-milde grüne Oliven nach Castelvetrano-Art und eine Prise Herbes de Provence machen aus einem schlichten Weizensauerteig ein mediterran angehauchtes Tischbrot. Salzig, kräuterwürzig und leicht säuerlich – dazu braucht es nur ein gutes Olivenöl.
description.es: Aceitunas verdes saladas al estilo Castelvetrano y un toque de hierbas de Provenza convierten un sencillo pan de trigo con masa madre en un pan de mesa de aire mediterráneo. Salado, herbáceo y ligeramente ácido, no necesita más que un buen aceite de oliva al lado.
description.fr: Des olives vertes salées façon Castelvetrano et une pincée d'herbes de Provence transforment un simple levain de blé en un pain de table aux accents méditerranéens. Salé, herbacé et légèrement acidulé, il ne demande qu'une bonne huile d'olive à ses côtés.

origin.note: A Mediterranean-leaning mix-in on the standard American artisan sourdough base, not tied to a single olive-growing region.

method.title: Build the levain
method.summary: Mix starter, bread flour, whole wheat flour and water; ripen about 5 hours.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the remaining flours and water; rest 1 hour.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Work in the levain, then the salt and reserved water.

method.title: Bulk ferment with olives
method.summary: Fold in the rinsed, pitted olives and herbes de Provence during the first stretch-and-fold, then continue with two more sets over about 3.5 hours.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide, preshape, rest 30 minutes, then shape into batards or boules; optionally roll in wheat germ.

method.title: Cold proof
method.summary: Proof seam-side-up in the refrigerator overnight, about 14 hours.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered with steam, then about 30 minutes uncovered until the crust is deep gold and the interior reads 96°C.

source.author: Maurizio Leo
source.adaptation: Baker's percentages recomputed to include the levain's flour and water in the 100% flour base per house convention (the source's own published percentages exclude it).
